overview: A full government health platform with a secure admin panel and a public customer portal. Admins manage services, configure payment numbers, and track applications. Customers browse services, submit applications with Bkash/Nagad payment, and track their status using a phone number or reference number.
features: Secure admin login with hardcoded credentials
Bkash and Nagad payment number configuration
Customer application form with auto-generated reference number
Bkash/Nagad payment modal showing configured numbers
Application status tracking by phone or reference number
Admin application management with search, filter, and status updates
